name: Patelco Credit Union San Jose East
description_short: Patelco Credit Union's San Jose East branch offers full-service banking including checking, savings, credit cards, personal loans, home loans, and investment services to members in the San Jose area.
description_long:
Patelco Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution operating multiple branches, including the San Jose East location at 1775 Story Road. As a credit union, Patelco serves its members through a cooperative structure rather than as a for-profit bank. The San Jose East branch has been established to serve the local community with convenient access to banking services.

The branch offers comprehensive financial products spanning deposit accounts (checking, savings, money market, certificates, IRAs, HSAs), credit products (credit cards with low-rate and rewards options, personal loans, debt consolidation, secured loans), mortgage services (home purchase, refinance, first-time homebuyer programs, home equity lines of credit), and auto/recreational vehicle loans. Additionally, the branch provides investment advisory services, insurance products, and digital banking through online and mobile platforms. The branch maintains extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturdays) and offers onsite parking, ATM access, and free WiFi.

The San Jose East branch distinguishes itself through specialized staffing including a dedicated Branch Manager (Robert Gonzalez), a Home Loan Consultant with 10+ years of mortgage experience fluent in Spanish (Yolanda Ortiz Velazquez, NMLS #1743035), and a Financial Advisor through Patelco Financial Solutions (Mani Budwal, CA Insurance License 0K91624). The branch emphasizes personalized service with appointment booking availability and highlights member education through financial wellness resources. The facility is wheelchair accessible and provides amenities like coffee/tea and member seating.

As a credit union branch rather than a full-service independent lender, Patelco's offerings are limited to what the parent organization provides rather than bespoke or alternative financing. While the branch provides standard banking and lending services, consumers should verify membership eligibility requirements and product availability. The San Jose East location serves as a local access point for a larger credit union network with routing number 321076470. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended branch hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturdays) for working professionals
Home Loan Consultant with 10+ years mortgage industry experience and Spanish language proficiency
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, credit cards, personal loans, mortgages, auto loans, and investments under one institution
Free onsite amenities including WiFi, coffee/tea, and parking
Wheelchair accessible with member seating areas
Appointment booking system for personalized service
Dedicated Financial Advisor on staff (Mani Budwal) for investments and financial planning
cons: Credit union membership eligibility requirements may restrict access for some consumers
Limited to products offered by parent Patelco organization; no alternative or specialty financing options
No same-day or emergency lending options visible in website content
Dependent on parent credit union's underwriting and approval standards rather than branch-specific flexibility
best_for: Eligible credit union members seeking comprehensive banking and lending services in San Jose
First-time homebuyers who benefit from specialized mortgage consultation and bilingual support
Individuals interested in integrated banking, investments, and financial planning services
diagnosis: Patelco Credit Union's San Jose East branch is best suited for existing or prospective credit union members seeking traditional full-service banking with a personal touch, particularly first-time homebuyers who benefit from specialized mortgage expertise. The main caveat is that this is a branch location dependent on parent organization policies, not an independent lender, so approval and product availability are subject to standard credit union membership and underwriting requirements.
services: Checking accounts (standard, Plus, Free Interest, Student options)
Savings accounts (regular, Money Market Plus, Money Market Select, Kids Savings)
Certificates of Deposit and IRA accounts
Home equity lines of credit (HELOC) and equity loans
Auto loans and recreational vehicle financing (RVs, boats, motorcycles)
Investment advisory and financial planning services
Digital banking (online banking, mobile app, bill pay, Zelle, digital wallets)
Loan payment services and assistance/deferral options
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1775 Story Rd Suite 110, San Jose, CA 95122
